headline: Seagate Mozaic 4 Plus Rollout Links Hyperscale Demand With Valuation Debate
summary: Seagate Technology Holdings launched its Mozaic 4+ HAMR-based storage platform and moved it into production-scale deployment with leading hyperscale cloud providers. The company has started shipment and at-scale qualification of Mozaic 4+ drives, targeting higher data density and energy efficiency for AI-focused data centers. The platform includes in-house photonics integration, aimed at improving supply resilience and cost economics for large cloud customers. At a share price of $352.8,...
